_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Primary Structure (3U) frame, deployable rail guide grooves, PC/104 standoffs

physics_paths.path: Launch vibration from 20g acceleration, transmitted through corner_posts to PC/104 stack and rails
Thermal cycling from -40 to +80°C, managed by Al 7075 and CFRP composite layers
Access to avionics and payload modules via removable trays and service panels

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate deployable solar panels along the exterior of the primary structure
Integrate thermal management systems such as heat pipes or radiators

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) for dimensional verification

verification_focus.description: Verify the primary structure can withstand launch vibration and deployment shock
Verify the structure maintains integrity during thermal cycling from -40 to +80°C
Verify all avionics and payload modules have removable trays or access panels

risk.mit: Test burn-wire release mechanism at extreme temperatures.

risk.desc: Spring-loaded hinge may not maintain alignment during deployment.
risk.mit: Implement alignment features or adjust spring specifications.

physics_paths.description: Solar pressure load applied to the deployer during deployment and in-orbit operations.

Thermal dissipation from the deployer to the surrounding environment.
Human access to service the deployer via the access panel.
